response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and geospatial experience, particularly with GISCollective, but lacks direct commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing/tiling pipelines. His distributed systems and low-latency work are relevant, though his recent roles skew toward TypeScript and AI tooling.
strengths: Extensive geospatial experience via GISCollective and Green Map, aligning with routing/tiling domain
Proven track record in distributed systems and low-latency applications (e.g., Sociomantic, Dunnhumby)
Strong problem-solving and experimentation mindset, evidenced by workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: Primary expertise in TypeScript/Node.js and Dlang, with limited C++/Rust production experience for routing pipelines
Recent roles focus on AI tooling and full-stack web development, diverging from core routing/tiling responsibilities
No explicit experience with navigation systems or rigorous QA for routing guidance solutions
